title: High-level concept: personal driver in your pocket
detail: Sponsored by root exp-concept-marketing. Narrative depth only exists because demo rides cost money.

topProblems.title: Need a one-line story strangers remember after one demo ride

features.title: Pitch: UberBlack / on-demand car service via iPhone — your personal driver in your pocket

targetUsers.title: Investors, press, and first SF riders hearing the pitch

statements.title: On-demand private rides at the push of a button
statements.detail: The elevator pitch: what strangers repeat after one demo ride

highLevelConcepts.title: UberBlack = on-demand car service via iPhone
highLevelConcepts.detail: Classic Ash Maurya X-for-Y — ties luxury car feel to consumer smartphone habit

highLevelConcepts.title: Limo service in your pocket
highLevelConcepts.detail: Shorthand for press and investor decks when ‘UberBlack’ is too product-specific

paths.title: Founder demos and free rides at tech/VC events

advantages.title: Category-defining one-liner
advantages.detail: Owns the ‘personal driver in your pocket’ frame before ride-hailing is a crowded category

advantages.title: Demo-ride recall
advantages.detail: Free influencer rides convert into repeatable WOM because the pitch is one sentence
